name: Progress Monitor
description: Monitor subagent progress and notify on stale tasks

staleTimeoutMs.description: Stale task timeout in milliseconds (default: 5 min)

execStaleTimeoutMs.description: Exec stale task timeout in milliseconds (default: 5 min)

execMinDurationMs.description: Minimum exec duration before monitoring kicks in (default: 1 min)

claudeProgressDir.description: Claude Code hooks progress directory (optional, auto-skip if not exists)

claudeStaleTimeoutMs.description: Claude stale threshold in ms (default: 2 min)

claudeNotifyIntervalMs.description: Min interval between Claude progress notifications (default: 1 min)
